steps.title: Find the base a from the given condition
steps.content: Use $g(3) = 2375$ with the given function $g(x) = 19 \cdot a^x$. Substituting: $$19 \cdot a^3 = 2375$$ Divide by 19: $$a^3 = 125$$ Take the cube root: $$a = 5$$

steps.title: Calculate g(4) using the exponential relationship
steps.content: In an exponential function, each unit increase in the exponent multiplies the output by the base $a$. Therefore: $$g(4) = g(3) \cdot a = 2375 \cdot 5 = 11875$$
